privileged_info_summary: Agent must: (1) Create parent category 'Artisan Coffee' with child 'Single Origin'. (2) Create variable product 'Ethiopian Yirgacheffe Coffee' SKU EYC-001 in Single Origin. Attributes: Roast Level (Light/Medium/Dark) and Size (250g/500g/1kg), 9 variations. Prices: 250g=$14.99, 500g=$24.99, 1kg=$39.99. Stock: Light/250g=50, Light/500g=30, Light/1kg=20, Medium/250g=60, Medium/500g=40, Medium/1kg=25, Dark/250g=45, Dark/500g=35, Dark/1kg=15 (total 320). Cross-sell: Organic Cotton T-Shirt (ID 59, SKU OCT-BLK-M). (3) Create shipping class 'Fragile Items' (slug fragile-items) and assign to product. (4) Create coupon COFFEE15: Fixed cart discount $5.00, min spend $25.00, limit 200, restricted to Single Origin category, expiry 2026-12-31. (5) Create order for Emily Chen (emily.chen@example.com, ID 6), billing NY, 2x Ethiopian Yirgacheffe Medium/500g + 1x Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (ID 57, WBH-001). Private note: 'Expedited shipping requested - fragile items included'. Status: Processing (internally wc-processing). WooCommerce 10.6.1, HPOS enabled, orders in wp_wc_orders.
